title: pricing_rules
description: Per-SKU, per-tier pricing. Each row is a single price point (not a multi-tier row). Non-null 'rule' is an optional math.js expression that must evaluate truthy for this price to apply (e.g. quantity-break: 'qty <= 50'). Null rule = always applies. For each SKU we expect one row per tier (tier1/tier2/tier3) at priority 0; additional priorities can layer quantity breaks.

sku.description: SKU this price applies to. Must match a product_components.sku in the same org.

rule.description: Optional math.js expression. Null = always applies. Variable 'qty' is available. Example: 'qty <= 50' for a quantity-break row.

priority.description: Lower = tried first. Quantity-break rows usually have higher priority than the always-applies row.
